evaluation_order: 1. Hard stops — any single hard stop = DO_NOT_PROCEED immediately

outcomes.DO_NOT_PROCEED: Hard stop triggered. No payment shown. Attorney referral shown.
outcomes.ATTORNEY_RECOMMENDED: Attorney flags present. Show acknowledgment gate. If acknowledged, treat as PROCEED_RISK.
outcomes.PROCEED_RISK: Risk flags only. Payment unlocked. Persistent risk banner shown throughout.
outcomes.PROCEED: No flags. Payment unlocked. Clean eligibility confirmation shown.

hard_stops.question: Q0-01
trigger: non_treaty_country
hard_stops.note: Q0-01 is a searchable_select - system checks selected country against treaty_countries.json

hard_stops.question: Q0-03
trigger: In the United States — without valid status

hard_stops.question: Q0-04
trigger: I do not have funds available right now

hard_stops.question: Q0-07
trigger: Yes — a loan that would be backed by the U.S. business itself

hard_stops.question: Q0-09
trigger: With more than one other person

hard_stops.question: Q0-10_sub
trigger: A property rental or investment business

hard_stops.question: Q0-03
trigger: In another country
hard_stops.message: As of September 6, 2025, E-2 visa applications must be filed at a consulate in your country of nationality or legal residence. Third-country processing is no longer available.

hard_stops.question: Q0-09a
trigger: It is a stock portfolio or financial investment
hard_stops.message: A stock portfolio or financial investment does not qualify for E-2. The E-2 requires a real and operating commercial enterprise.

hard_stops.question: Q0-09a
trigger: It is a non-profit or charitable organisation
hard_stops.message: Non-profit organisations are explicitly excluded from E-2 investor classification under 9 FAM 402.9-6(C).

attorney_flags.question: Q0-03
trigger: In the United States — I am not sure of my status

attorney_flags.question: Q0-03
trigger: In another country
attorney_flags.message: As of September 6, 2025, E-2 visa applications must be filed at a consulate in your country of nationality or legal residence. Processing at a third-country consulate is no longer permitted. If you are temporarily abroad, you will need to apply when you return home. An immigration attorney can advise on your specific situation.

attorney_flags.question: Q0-E2
trigger: Yes — my application was denied

attorney_flags.question: Q0-E2
trigger: Yes — my application is still pending or under review

attorney_flags.question: Q0-07
trigger: I am not sure how the loan would be structured

attorney_flags.question: Q0-08
trigger: As a manager — I will oversee the business and hire people to run daily operations

attorney_flags.question: Q0-11
trigger: Yes — once, in the last 5 years

attorney_flags.question: Q0-11
trigger: Yes — more than once

attorney_flags.question: Q0-11
trigger: I am not sure

attorney_flags.question: Q0-12
trigger: Yes
I am not sure

attorney_flags.question: Q0-13
trigger: Yes — a minor matter, in the last 10 years

attorney_flags.question: Q0-13
trigger: Yes — something more serious

attorney_flags.question: Q0-13
trigger: I am not sure

attorney_flags.question: Q0-NI-composite
attorney_flags.note: Composite: calculated after Q0-NI-01, Q0-NI-02, Q0-NI-03

attorney_flags.question: Q0-16_sub
trigger: We are in a common-law or de facto relationship

attorney_flags.question: Q0-17
trigger: No — they are not
I am not sure

attorney_flags.question: Q0-19
trigger: One or more are 21 or older

attorney_flags.question: Q0-19
trigger: One or more are married

attorney_flags.question: Q0-20
trigger: Yes
I am not sure

attorney_flags.question: Q0-14c
trigger: Through a family trust or other trust structure
Through a combination of the above
attorney_flags.note: Trust ownership adds complexity to treaty-national ownership analysis

attorney_flags.question: Q0-14d
trigger: I am not sure
attorney_flags.note: Below-50% ownership without confirmed control rights

attorney_flags.question: Q0-14e
trigger: I am not sure — we need to decide this
attorney_flags.note: Mixed-nationality partnership needs clear E-visa nationality designation

attorney_flags.question: Q0-05a
trigger: In the planning stage — I have not yet secured the funds
attorney_flags.note: Applicant not yet in the process of investing under 9 FAM

attorney_flags.question: Q0-business-cost
attorney_flags.note: Investment below 30% of total business cost — substantiality will be heavily scrutinised

risk_flags.question: Q0-02
trigger: It has expired but I am still a citizen
No — I do not have one

risk_flags.question: Q0-04
trigger: I have the funds but I have not chosen a business yet
I am still figuring out the finances

risk_flags.question: Q0-15
trigger: No — they will be more of a silent partner
We have not decided yet

risk_flags.question: Q0-06
trigger: Yes — but parts of it may be harder to document
I have the money but I have not thought about the paper trail yet

risk_flags.question: Q0-11
trigger: Yes — once, more than 5 years ago

risk_flags.question: Q0-13
trigger: Yes — a minor matter, more than 10 years ago

risk_flags.question: Q0-NI-01
trigger: Yes — but I am thinking of selling before I move

risk_flags.question: Q0-NI-02
trigger: No — all close family is moving with me

risk_flags.question: Q0-NI-03
trigger: No — I plan to close everything and move it all
I am not sure

risk_flags.question: Q0-NI-composite
risk_flags.note: Composite: calculated after Q0-NI-01, Q0-NI-02, Q0-NI-03

risk_flags.question: Q0-18
trigger: No — one or more passports are expired or missing
I am not sure

risk_flags.question: Q0-19
trigger: One or more are close to turning 21 (within the next 2–3 years)

risk_flags.question: Q0-TIMELINE
trigger: Within the next 3 months

risk_flags.question: Q0-target-date
trigger: Within 6 months
risk_flags.note: Ambitious timeline — applicant needs to start immediately

risk_flags.question: Q0-business-type
trigger: I have not identified a specific business yet
risk_flags.note: Business must be identified before application can be filed

risk_flags.question: Q0-14c
trigger: Through a holding company or corporation
risk_flags.note: Holding company ownership — verify effective ownership percentage through chain

risk_flags.question: Q0-14d
trigger: No — my control is based on ownership percentage only
risk_flags.note: Below-50% ownership without documented control rights — may not meet develop and direct requirement

risk_flags.question: Q0-05a
trigger: Partially committed — some funds committed, remainder being transferred
Not yet committed — I have the funds available but not yet deployed
risk_flags.note: Investment not yet fully committed — documentation of deployment timeline needed

risk_flags.question: Q0-09a
trigger: It is a real estate investment or property holding
risk_flags.note: Real estate — must demonstrate active operations, not passive holding

risk_flags.question: Q0-09a
trigger: I am not sure of the structure
risk_flags.note: Business structure unclear — must confirm active for-profit enterprise

risk_flags.question: Q0-14c
trigger: I am not sure
risk_flags.note: Ownership structure unclear — must confirm treaty-national ownership percentage

risk_flags.question: Q0-business-cost
risk_flags.note: Investment 30-49% of total business cost — proportionality may be questioned

investment_thresholds_usd.currency_conversion: Convert to USD using daily cached rate before applying thresholds. Display rate used to user.
investment_thresholds_usd.note: No statutory minimum. Thresholds are advisory based on observed consulate practice.

post_payment_routing.solo: Load solo onboarding flow in Module 1
post_payment_routing.partnership: Load partnership onboarding flow in Module 1
post_payment_routing.family: Load spouse + children tabs in Module 3
post_payment_routing.risk_flags_present: Show persistent risk notes at relevant tabs

non_immigrant_intent_composite.description: After Q0-NI-01, Q0-NI-02, Q0-NI-03 — count confirmed ties to home country

Q0-NI-01: Yes — and I plan to keep it
Q0-NI-02: Yes — immediate family will remain (spouse, children, parents)
Yes — extended family will remain (siblings, grandparents, other relatives)
Some family will stay, some will come with me
Q0-NI-03: Yes — I plan to keep my accounts open
Probably — I have not decided yet

treaty_country_check.description: Q0-01 validates selected country against treaty_countries.json

proportionality_scoring.description: Investment proportionality test — compares Q0-05 investment amount to Q0-business-cost total. Uses midpoint of investment range.
proportionality_scoring.skip_if: Q0-business-type = 'I have not identified a specific business yet'

session_record_fields: Q0-01 now checks against treaty_countries.json instead of static options
Added Q0-E2: Prior E-2 application history (W-E2-DENIED, W-E2-PENDING)
Added Q0-STATE: Target U.S. state selector
Q0-10 now has sub_question for business type details
Q0-16 has sub_question for spouse relationship type (W-COMMONLAW)
Non-immigrant intent questions now use [home country] instead of Canada
Stage-aware routing: W-04 now triggers for Stage A/B users with uncommitted funds
